description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on push and workflow dispatch events. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build and test on Windows 2019 and 2022 with Debug, Release, DevDist, and LuaDist build types. It checks out the code, unshallows the Git repository if necessary, downloads nCine-libraries artifacts and nCine-data, and then configures, builds, and tests using CMake. For DevDist and LuaDist build types, it packages the artifacts and pushes them to a public repository.
